---
title: "Jackie Lay"
subtitle: "art director, illustrator and animator"
format: html
image: http://www.jackielay.com/images/design/jackielay_FreeSpeech.jpg
image-alt: Flag art by Jackie Lay
---

![](http://www.jackielay.com/images/design/jackielay_FreeSpeech.jpg "American flag art with writing on top")

![](http://www.jackielay.com/images/illustration/jackielay_Hillary1.jpg "Art pieces on immigration and belonging by Jackie Lay")

<http://www.jackielay.com/>
